steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: The solution to a graphed system is the point where the two lines cross, because that point lies on both lines at the same time. On the grid, the crossing point is at $x=2$ and $y=2$.

steps.title: Match the ordered pair
steps.content: The solution is the ordered pair $(2,2)$. It has the same $x$-coordinate and $y$-coordinate read from the intersection, so it matches the correct answer, B.
